burn.name: Burn
burn.desc: Take 1 fire damage per turn for 4 turns. Strength is reduced by 2 while burning.

poison.name: Poison
poison.desc: Escalating toxin damage over 3 turns: 1 damage, then 2, then 3.

acid_corrosion.name: Acid Corrosion
acid_corrosion.desc: Corrosive acid eats through armour: reduce Physical Defence by 1 each turn for 5 turns (stack -1 per turn on the sheet). No direct HP damage unless the GM adds it.

incapacitated.name: Incapacitated
incapacitated.desc: Cannot take actions. Covers stun, knockout, daze and similar hard-control effects.

immobilized.name: Immobilized
immobilized.desc: Cannot move, but can still attack/cast if otherwise able. Covers freeze, entangle and paralysis-like roots.

mind_controlled.name: Mind Controlled
mind_controlled.desc: Mental control variant. Fear forces movement away; charm prevents attacks against the charmer.

weakened.name: Weakened
weakened.desc: All major stats are reduced by 2 while active. Combines slow, weak and confused style effects.

cursed.name: Cursed
cursed.desc: Hexed: -2 Accuracy and -1 Magic Power for 8 turns. Using Stamina abilities also costs 1 extra Stamina while cursed.

regeneration.name: Regeneration
regeneration.desc: Restore 2 HP per turn for 5 turns. Also grants immunity/resistance to poison and disease while active.

hp_regen.name: HP Regen
hp_regen.desc: Restore 1 HP at the start of each turn for 5 turns (Process Turn).

stamina_regen.name: Stamina Regen
stamina_regen.desc: Restore 1 Stamina at the start of each turn for 5 turns (Process Turn).

mana_focus.name: Mana Focus
mana_focus.desc: Restore 1 Stamina at the start of each turn while a staff or wand is equipped (Mana Focus passive).

enhanced.name: Enhanced
enhanced.desc: Physical enhancement: Strength +2, Speed +2 and Physical Defence +2 while active.

empowered.name: Empowered
empowered.desc: +3 Magic Power for 6 turns. Magical toggle skills cost 1 less Stamina per turn (minimum 1).

weapon_enchanted.name: Weapon Enchanted
weapon_enchanted.desc: Weapon attacks deal +1d6 elemental damage (fire, ice, lightning, or radiant — chosen when applied) for 10 turns.

protected.name: Protected
protected.desc: +3 Physical Defence and +3 Magical Defence for 6 turns. Represents a ward that absorbs incoming blows.

spell_warded.name: Spell Warded
spell_warded.desc: +4 Magical Defence for 8 turns. Immune to Charm, Fear, and Weakened from magical sources while active.

enhanced_mobility.name: Enhanced Mobility
enhanced_mobility.desc: +2 Speed for 10 turns. Immune to Immobilized while active. Can ignore difficult terrain at normal Speed.

stealth_mastery.name: Stealth Mastery
stealth_mastery.desc: Invisible/hard to target and resistant to mental effects. Perfect sneaky-gremlin mode.

intimidating_aura.name: Intimidating Aura
intimidating_aura.desc: Aura (30ft): enemies starting their turn nearby must resist Fear or cannot move toward you willingly.

toxic_presence.name: Toxic Presence
toxic_presence.desc: Aura (15ft): enemies nearby take 1 poison pressure damage per turn on Process Turn; allies in the aura gain Poison Immunity while you are the source.

fear.name: Fear
fear.desc: Target must move away, cannot willingly approach, or takes disadvantage while facing the source.

charm.name: Charm
charm.desc: Target cannot attack the charmer and may treat them as friendly until harmed or the effect ends.

silenced.name: Silenced
silenced.desc: Cannot use voice-based spells, commands, shouts, or sound effects.

blinded.name: Blinded
blinded.desc: Cannot see. Attacks and perception relying on sight are heavily penalised.

knockdown.name: Knockdown
knockdown.desc: Knocked prone for 1 turn: -2 Accuracy and cannot move until you spend an action to stand.

poison_immunity.name: Poison Immunity
poison_immunity.desc: Immune to poison damage and poison status effects.

poison_resistance.name: Poison Resistance
poison_resistance.desc: Poison damage is halved and you cannot gain new Poison stacks while this lasts. Existing Poison still ticks.

disease_immunity.name: Disease Immunity
disease_immunity.desc: Immune to disease and poison-based debuffs except legendary sources.

fire_resistance.name: Fire Resistance
fire_resistance.desc: Take half fire damage and cannot gain Burn while this is active. Existing Burn still ticks.

undead_bane.name: Undead Bane
undead_bane.desc: Attacks against undead deal +1d6 radiant damage and have +2 Accuracy against undead targets.

burn_on_hit.name: Burn On Hit
burn_on_hit.desc: On hit: 40% chance (Tier 3+) to apply Burn for 4 turns — 1 fire damage per turn and -2 Strength.

freeze_on_hit.name: Freeze On Hit
freeze_on_hit.desc: On hit: 40% chance (Tier 3+) to apply Immobilized for 3 turns — cannot move but may still attack.

wind_slash.name: Wind Slash
wind_slash.desc: Release a 20ft wind blade for 1d6 slashing damage and push the target 10ft on a hit.

bleeding.name: Bleeding
bleeding.desc: Bleeding wound: lose 1 HP at the start of each turn for 3 turns. Bandaging ends the effect early.

dragon_fire.name: Dragon Fire
dragon_fire.desc: Attack deals +1d6 fire damage. On hit, 75% chance to apply Burn. Frightened targets take +1 extra fire damage.

poison_on_hit.name: Poison On Hit
poison_on_hit.desc: On hit: 40% chance (Tier 3+) to apply Poison — escalating 1, then 2, then 3 damage over 3 turns.

stealth_strike.name: Stealth Strike
stealth_strike.desc: First attack from hidden gains +2 Accuracy and +1d6 damage. Breaks stealth after the attack.

critical_strike.name: Critical Strike
critical_strike.desc: Critical hits occur on a natural 19–20 and deal +1 weapon damage die on crits.

phase_strike.name: Phase Strike
phase_strike.desc: This attack ignores 3 points of Physical Defence and 3 points of Magical Defence.

shadow_step.name: Shadow Step
shadow_step.desc: Teleport up to 30ft between shadows or dim light. Does not provoke opportunity attacks.

time_strike.name: Time Strike
time_strike.desc: Once per scene: make an extra weapon attack immediately after this hit lands.

piercing.name: Piercing
piercing.desc: Ignore 2 points of cover or Physical Defence on this attack.

shock_on_hit.name: Shock On Hit
shock_on_hit.desc: On hit: 40% chance (Tier 3+) to apply Incapacitated for 1 turn on a failed endurance save.

nature_blessing.name: Nature Blessing
nature_blessing.desc: +2 Accuracy and +1 Magic Power in natural terrain for 8 turns. Restore 1 HP when you start a turn outdoors.

piercing_light.name: Piercing Light
piercing_light.desc: Attacks ignore darkness penalties and deal +1d4 radiant damage to shadow or undead targets.

lightning_arrows.name: Lightning Arrows
lightning_arrows.desc: Ranged attacks deal +1d6 lightning damage. On hit, 40% chance to apply Incapacitated for 1 turn.

star_arrows.name: Star Arrows
star_arrows.desc: Ranged attacks deal +1d6 radiant damage. +2 Accuracy while attacking in darkness.

armor_pierce.name: Armor Pierce
armor_pierce.desc: Reduce the target's Physical Defence by 2 for this attack only.

holy_strike.name: Holy Strike
holy_strike.desc: Attack deals +1d6 radiant damage. +2 Accuracy against undead, demons, and creatures of darkness.

earthquake.name: Earthquake
earthquake.desc: 10ft burst: 2d6 earth damage and apply Knockdown to enemies who fail a Speed save.

thunder_strike.name: Thunder Strike
thunder_strike.desc: Attack deals +1d6 thunder damage. 40% chance to apply Incapacitated for 1 turn.

earth_shatter.name: Earth Shatter
earth_shatter.desc: Attack deals +1d8 earth damage and reduces target Physical Defence by 2 until end of next turn.

void_impact.name: Void Impact
void_impact.desc: Attack deals +1d6 void damage and pushes the target 10ft on a hit.

cleave.name: Cleave
cleave.desc: If this attack drops or crits, immediately deal half the rolled damage to one adjacent enemy.

double_strike.name: Double Strike
double_strike.desc: Make two attack rolls with the same action; the second hit uses the same modifiers but no extra once-per-turn bonuses.

lifesteal.name: Lifesteal
lifesteal.desc: Heal HP equal to half the damage dealt by this attack (rounded down, minimum 1).

rage_mode.name: Rage Mode
rage_mode.desc: +2 Strength and +2 Speed for 8 turns, but -1 Physical Defence while raging.

execution.name: Execution
execution.desc: Deal +1d6 damage against targets below half HP.

chaos_strike.name: Chaos Strike
chaos_strike.desc: Add +1d6 damage of a random element (fire, ice, lightning, or void) on each hit.

reality_cut.name: Reality Cut
reality_cut.desc: Once per scene: this attack ignores all defence and cover. Deals normal weapon damage + 2d6 force.

mana_efficiency.name: Mana Efficiency
mana_efficiency.desc: Toggle and active skills cost 1 less Stamina per turn for 10 turns (minimum 1).

drain_mana.name: Drain Mana
drain_mana.desc: Target loses 1d4+1 Stamina; you regain half that amount (rounded up).

elemental_mastery.name: Elemental Mastery
elemental_mastery.desc: +2 Magic Power and +1 Accuracy with elemental skills for 10 turns.

cosmic_power.name: Cosmic Power
cosmic_power.desc: +4 Magic Power and +2 Magical Defence for 6 turns. Legendary cosmic effects only.

creation_magic.name: Creation Magic
creation_magic.desc: +3 Magic Power for 8 turns. Can shape minor objects or barriers as a narrative effect.

reach.name: Reach
reach.desc: Melee reach increases by 5ft for 10 turns.

anti_cavalry.name: Anti Cavalry
anti_cavalry.desc: +2 Accuracy and +1d6 damage against mounted or charging targets.

sweeping_strikes.name: Sweeping Strikes
sweeping_strikes.desc: One melee attack may hit up to 2 adjacent targets at -1 Accuracy each.

dragon_slayer.name: Dragon Slayer
dragon_slayer.desc: +2 Accuracy and +1d6 damage against dragons and draconic creatures.

infinite_reach.name: Infinite Reach
infinite_reach.desc: Legendary: melee attacks reach 30ft with line of sight for 3 turns.

dimension_pierce.name: Dimension Pierce
dimension_pierce.desc: Legendary: ignore all physical barriers and 6 points of total defence once per scene.

damage_reduction.name: Damage Reduction
damage_reduction.desc: Reduce each incoming hit by 1 damage for 10 turns (minimum 0).

multiattack.name: Multiattack
multiattack.desc: Each turn, make 2 different attacks (each pays its own stamina cost).

quick_draw.name: Quick Draw
quick_draw.desc: You may attack with ranged weapons the same turn you move (others cannot).

mana_regeneration.name: Mana Regeneration
mana_regeneration.desc: Restore 1 Stamina at the start of each turn while active.

fire_immunity.name: Fire Immunity
fire_immunity.desc: Immune to fire damage and Burn while active.

cold_aura.name: Cold Aura
cold_aura.desc: Aura (15ft): enemies nearby lose 2 Speed. When an enemy enters or starts their turn in the aura, 40% chance to apply Immobilized.

stealth.name: Stealth
stealth.desc: +3 Accuracy on stealth attacks and +2 Speed when you did not attack last turn.

spell_absorption.name: Spell Absorption
spell_absorption.desc: Once while active: negate one spell targeting you and regain Stamina equal to that spell's cost.

light_aura.name: Light Aura
light_aura.desc: Aura (20ft): allies gain +1 Accuracy vs Fear and +1 Magical Defence. Undead in the aura take 1 radiant damage per turn (GM tracks on enemies).

haste.name: Haste
haste.desc: +2 Speed for 8 turns and +1 extra movement action each turn.

burn_aura.name: Burn Aura
burn_aura.desc: Aura (10ft): adjacent enemies take 1 fire damage per turn on Process Turn (track on enemies). 40% chance to apply Burn when they enter.

frost_aura.name: Frost Aura
frost_aura.desc: Aura (15ft): enemies lose 2 Speed nearby. 40% chance to apply Immobilized when they start their turn inside.

lightning_bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
lightning_bolt.desc: Ranged spell: 2d6 lightning damage in a line. 40% chance to apply Incapacitated for 1 turn on failed save.

invisibility.name: Invisibility
invisibility.desc: Cannot be seen normally for 5 turns. +4 Accuracy on the first attack; broken after attacking or taking damage.

silent_movement.name: Silent Movement
silent_movement.desc: +3 Accuracy on stealth rolls and movement makes no sound for 5 turns.

immovable.name: Immovable
immovable.desc: Cannot be pushed, knocked down, or forcibly moved for 10 turns. +2 Physical Defence while planted.

flight.name: Flight
flight.desc: Fly at your normal Speed for 10 turns. Immune to ground-based Immobilized.

spell_resistance.name: Spell Resistance
spell_resistance.desc: +3 Magical Defence for 10 turns. Reduce incoming spell damage by half (round down).

stone_skin.name: Stone Skin
stone_skin.desc: +3 Physical Defence for 10 turns. Reduce mundane weapon damage by 1 per hit.

shadow_stealth.name: Shadow Stealth
shadow_stealth.desc: +4 Accuracy in dim light or darkness for 5 turns.

radiant_aura.name: Radiant Aura
radiant_aura.desc: Aura (20ft): allies gain +1 Magical Defence. Undead in the aura take 1 radiant damage per turn (track on enemies).

nature_resistance.name: Nature Resistance
nature_resistance.desc: +2 Physical Defence and +2 Magical Defence in wilderness. Immune to poison plants and weather exhaustion.

mirror_image.name: Mirror Image
mirror_image.desc: The next 2 attacks against you have a 50% chance to hit an illusion instead (track uses manually).

critical_chance.name: Critical Chance
critical_chance.desc: Critical hits occur on natural 19–20 for 10 turns.

luck.name: Luck
luck.desc: +2 Accuracy and +1 Speed for 8 turns — fortune favours the bold.

magic_sight.name: Magic Sight
magic_sight.desc: +3 Accuracy to detect magic, traps, and hidden enchantments for 10 turns.

identify.name: Identify
identify.desc: Instantly identify magical items and active enchantments on touch (utility, not combat).

crush.name: Crush
crush.desc: +2 Strength for this attack and 40% chance to apply Knockdown on hit.

spell_memory.name: Spell Memory
spell_memory.desc: Prepare one additional spell or skill option until your next long rest (narrative +1 prepared ability).

keen_sight.name: Keen Sight
keen_sight.desc: +2 Accuracy on perception and ranged attacks for 10 turns.

steady_hands.name: Steady Hands
steady_hands.desc: +2 Accuracy on ranged and fine-tool actions for 10 turns.

long_range_sight.name: Long Range Sight
long_range_sight.desc: +2 Accuracy at long range; ignore the first range penalty band for 10 turns.

concentration.name: Concentration
concentration.desc: +2 Magic Power and +2 Magical Defence while you sustain a channeled spell, toggle stance, or similar ongoing ability.

heal_2.name: Heal 2
heal_2.desc: Instantly restore 2 HP when consumed or activated.

heal_5.name: Heal 5
heal_5.desc: Instantly restore 5 HP when consumed or activated.

heal_3.name: Heal 3
heal_3.desc: Instantly restore 3 HP when consumed or activated.

restore_stamina_2.name: Restore Stamina 2
restore_stamina_2.desc: Instantly restore 2 Stamina when consumed or activated.

heal_8.name: Heal 8
heal_8.desc: Instantly restore 8 HP when consumed or activated.

restore_stamina_5.name: Restore Stamina 5
restore_stamina_5.desc: Instantly restore 5 Stamina when consumed or activated.

heal_25.name: Heal 25
heal_25.desc: Instantly restore 25 HP when consumed or activated.

restore_stamina_15.name: Restore Stamina 15
restore_stamina_15.desc: Instantly restore 15 Stamina when consumed or activated.

heal_50.name: Heal 50
heal_50.desc: Instantly restore 50 HP when consumed or activated.

restore_stamina_30.name: Restore Stamina 30
restore_stamina_30.desc: Instantly restore 30 Stamina when consumed or activated.

temp_defense_4.name: Temp Defense 4
temp_defense_4.desc: +2 Physical Defence and +2 Magical Defence for 6 turns.

invisibility_5_turns.name: Invisibility 5 Turns
invisibility_5_turns.desc: Invisible for 5 turns: +4 Accuracy on first attack; ends if you attack or take damage.

fire_immunity_10_turns.name: Fire Immunity 10 Turns
fire_immunity_10_turns.desc: Immune to fire damage and Burn for 10 turns.

cold_immunity_10_turns.name: Cold Immunity 10 Turns
cold_immunity_10_turns.desc: Immune to cold damage and Immobilized from ice for 10 turns.

temp_defense_minus_2.name: Temp Defense Minus 2
temp_defense_minus_2.desc: -2 Physical Defence and -2 Magical Defence for 4 turns.

cast_fireball.name: Cast Fireball
cast_fireball.desc: Cast Fireball: 3d6 fire damage in a 20ft burst. 75% chance to apply Burn to each failed save target.

heal_40.name: Heal 40
heal_40.desc: Instantly restore 40 HP when consumed or activated.

remove_poison.name: Remove Poison
remove_poison.desc: Remove Poison and all poison damage-over-time effects immediately.

teleport.name: Teleport
teleport.desc: Instantly move up to 60ft to a visible location. Does not cost a movement action.

full_heal.name: Full Heal
full_heal.desc: Restore HP to your current maximum immediately.

remove_all_debuffs.name: Remove All Debuffs
remove_all_debuffs.desc: Remove all negative status effects and stat debuffs immediately.

fire_immunity_permanent.name: Fire Immunity Permanent
fire_immunity_permanent.desc: Permanent immunity to fire damage and Burn (legendary).

permanent_hp_5.name: Permanent HP 5
permanent_hp_5.desc: Permanently increase maximum HP by 5 after consumption.

permanent_strength_2.name: Permanent Strength 2
permanent_strength_2.desc: Permanently increase base Strength by 2 after consumption.

dragon_breath.name: Dragon Breath
dragon_breath.desc: Cone (30ft): 3d6 fire damage. 75% chance to apply Burn to each target in the cone.

permanent_all_stats_1.name: Permanent All Stats 1
permanent_all_stats_1.desc: Permanently increase Strength, Magic Power, Accuracy, and Speed by 1 after consumption.

regeneration_permanent.name: Regeneration Permanent
regeneration_permanent.desc: Permanent: restore 1 HP at the start of each turn (Process Turn). Legendary.

unlock_doors.name: Unlock Doors
unlock_doors.desc: +3 Accuracy on lockpicking and can bypass mundane non-magical locks with tools.

climb_assistance.name: Climb Assistance
climb_assistance.desc: +3 Accuracy on climbing checks and you cannot fall more than 10ft from a failed climb.

light_source.name: Light Source
light_source.desc: Bright light 20ft and dim light 40ft. Lasts until extinguished (utility).

fire_damage.name: Fire Damage
fire_damage.desc: Attacks deal +1d4 fire damage while this weapon effect is active.

undead_damage.name: Undead Damage
undead_damage.desc: Attacks deal +1d6 radiant damage to undead targets.

purify.name: Purify
purify.desc: Remove Poison, disease, and one minor curse from food, water, or a willing target.

parry_bonus.name: Parry Bonus
parry_bonus.desc: +2 Physical Defence when using a parry or block reaction for 8 turns.

crushing.name: Crushing
crushing.desc: +2 Strength for this attack and 40% chance to apply Knockdown on hit.

critical_bleeding.name: Critical Bleeding
critical_bleeding.desc: Critical hit causes deep bleeding: 2 HP lost per turn for 3 turns.

armor_piercing.name: Armor Piercing
armor_piercing.desc: Reduce target Physical Defence by 2 for this attack.

stunning.name: Stunning
stunning.desc: 40% chance on hit to apply Incapacitated for 1 turn.

magic_damage.name: Magic Damage
magic_damage.desc: Spells and magical attacks deal +1d4 magic damage while this effect is active.

critical_immunity.name: Critical Immunity
critical_immunity.desc: Critical hits against you become normal hits for 10 turns.

flexible_defense.name: Flexible Defense
flexible_defense.desc: +2 Physical Defence OR +2 Magical Defence each turn (choose at start of turn) for 8 turns.

void_damage.name: Void Damage
void_damage.desc: Attacks deal +1d6 void damage, effective against magical barriers.

life_steal.name: Life Steal
life_steal.desc: Heal HP equal to half the damage dealt by this attack (rounded down, minimum 1).

reflect_damage.name: Reflect Damage
reflect_damage.desc: When hit in melee, the attacker takes 2 damage back for 6 turns.

magic_barrier.name: Magic Barrier
magic_barrier.desc: +3 Magical Defence for 8 turns. The first magical hit each turn is reduced by 3 damage.

auto_healing.name: Auto Healing
auto_healing.desc: Restore 1 HP at the start of each turn while equipped or active.

critical_strikes.name: Critical Strikes
critical_strikes.desc: Critical hits on 19–20 and crits deal +1 damage die.

energy_waves.name: Energy Waves
energy_waves.desc: Melee attacks release a 15ft energy wave for 1d4 force damage to one secondary target.

damage_immunity.name: Damage Immunity
damage_immunity.desc: Legendary: immune to non-magical weapon damage for 3 turns.

titan_strength.name: Titan Strength
titan_strength.desc: +3 Strength and +2 Physical Defence for 8 turns. Heavy weapons deal +1 damage die.

ranged_training.name: Ranged Training
ranged_training.desc: +1 Accuracy while wielding a ranged weapon.

combat_stance.name: Combat Stance
combat_stance.desc: +1 Physical Defence while wielding a sword.

defensive_stance_buff.name: Defensive Stance
defensive_stance_buff.desc: Active stance: +2 Physical Defence and +2 Magical Defence, but -1 attack damage.

berserker_rage_buff.name: Berserker Rage
berserker_rage_buff.desc: Active rage: +2 Strength and +2 Speed, but -1 Physical Defence.

fortress_stance_buff.name: Fortress Stance
fortress_stance_buff.desc: Active fortress stance: +4 Physical Defence and +4 Magical Defence.

stagger.name: Stagger
stagger.desc: Target is off-balance: -2 Accuracy and cannot use reactions until the end of their next turn.

exhausted.name: Exhausted
exhausted.desc: Overextended. -1 to all stats and cannot cast spells while exhausted.

staff_training.name: Staff Training
staff_training.desc: +1 Magic Power while wielding a staff.

light_step.name: Light Step
light_step.desc: +1 Speed and silent movement while wielding daggers.

dagger_mastery_passive.name: Dagger Mastery
dagger_mastery_passive.desc: +2 Speed while wielding daggers (Dagger Mastery passive).

spell_penetration.name: Spell Penetration
spell_penetration.desc: Spells ignore 2 points of Magical Defence.

mind_shield.name: Mind Shield
mind_shield.desc: Immune to mind control, illusions, charm, fear, and possession.

hammer_mastery_passive.name: Hammer Mastery
hammer_mastery_passive.desc: Immune to Incapacitated while Hammer Mastery is active.

elemental_mastery_passive.name: Elemental Mastery
elemental_mastery_passive.desc: All attacks deal +1d4 elemental damage of your chosen element; immunity to that element.

rapid_regeneration.name: Rapid Regeneration
rapid_regeneration.desc: Restore 3 HP per turn (Rapid Healing passive). Strong resistance to damage-over-time.

ice_resistance.name: Ice Resistance
ice_resistance.desc: Take half ice damage and cannot gain Immobilized from cold while active.

lightning_resistance.name: Lightning Resistance
lightning_resistance.desc: Take half lightning damage while active.

earth_resistance.name: Earth Resistance
earth_resistance.desc: Take half earth damage while active.

wind_resistance.name: Wind Resistance
wind_resistance.desc: Take half wind damage while active.

water_resistance.name: Water Resistance
water_resistance.desc: Take half water damage while active.

darkness_resistance.name: Darkness Resistance
darkness_resistance.desc: Take half darkness damage while active.

light_resistance.name: Light Resistance
light_resistance.desc: Take half light damage while active.

ice_weakness.name: Ice Weakness
ice_weakness.desc: Take double ice damage while active.

fire_weakness.name: Fire Weakness
fire_weakness.desc: Take double fire damage while active.

lightning_weakness.name: Lightning Weakness
lightning_weakness.desc: Take double lightning damage while active.

water_weakness.name: Water Weakness
water_weakness.desc: Take double water damage while active.

earth_weakness.name: Earth Weakness
earth_weakness.desc: Take double earth damage while active.

wind_weakness.name: Wind Weakness
wind_weakness.desc: Take double wind damage while active.

darkness_weakness.name: Darkness Weakness
darkness_weakness.desc: Take double darkness damage while active.

light_weakness.name: Light Weakness
light_weakness.desc: Take double light damage while active.

incapacitated_resistance.name: Incapacitated Resistance
incapacitated_resistance.desc: Resistance to Incapacitated and similar hard-control effects (Human Determination).

knockdown_resistance.name: Knockdown Resistance
knockdown_resistance.desc: Resistance to knockdown and prone effects (Dwarven Toughness).

shadow_affinity_passive.name: Shadow Affinity
shadow_affinity_passive.desc: +3 stealth in dim light or darkness; darkvision extends to 150ft.
